# Autoniv · llms.txt

> **Autoniv** is an AI voice agents platform that deploys intelligent voice agents to handle business calls 24/7 in 20+ languages. Automate appointments, qualify leads, and boost conversions with autonomous AI phone agents.

## Core Pages

- [Homepage](https://autoniv.com/): AI voice agents for business — automate calls, appointments, and lead qualification
- [About Us](https://autoniv.com/about): Our mission to make AI voice technology accessible for every business
- [Help Center](https://autoniv.com/help): Documentation, guides, and support for Autoniv
- [Pricing](https://autoniv.com/#pricing): Transparent pricing plans for AI voice agents

## Resources

- [Blog](https://autoniv.com/blog): Insights on AI voice technology, automation trends, and business use cases
- [Press](https://autoniv.com/press): Autoniv in the news — media coverage and press releases
- [Careers](https://autoniv.com/careers): Join the Autoniv team — open roles and company culture

## Legal

- [Privacy Policy](https://autoniv.com/privacy): How Autoniv collects, uses, and protects your data
- [Terms & Conditions](https://autoniv.com/terms): Terms governing use of the Autoniv platform

## Products

- AI Voice Agents: Autonomous voice agents that handle inbound and outbound calls
- Lead Qualification: AI-powered lead scoring and qualification via voice conversations
- Appointment Scheduling: Automated booking and calendar management through voice agents
- Multi-language Support: Voice agents operating in 20+ languages for global reach
- Call Analytics: Real-time insights and reporting on call performance and outcomes
